chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 60 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of C.M.A 142/2011 29.11.2016. Mr. Hakim Ali Siddiqui, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro, Advocate for respondents -.-.-. It has been stated by Mr. Hakim Ali Siddiqui, the learned Counsel for applicant, that this Revision Application was filed against the conditional grant of injunctive relief by the learned Appellate Court and since the suit has been decreed by the Trial Court, therefore, this Revision Application has become infructuous. This position has not been disputed by Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro, the learned Counsel representing respondents; however, he states that he has impugned the said decree before the Appellate Forum. In view of the above statement and factual as well as legal position, present Revision Application is disposed of as having become infructuous alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
